title: Blissful Fermented Bliss Wrap
description: A tangy and refreshing fermented bliss wrap perfect for vegan diets. Enjoy as a snack or light meal.
instructions: Step 1: In a large bowl, combine ferment, celery, and bliss.
Step 2: Mix well until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
Step 3: Transfer the mixture to a wrap or tortilla.
Step 5: Store leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
